rows.label: qev027004_MSG0001
rows.name: Welcome back, jan! Good work, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0002
rows.name:
I heard, dawayo.
It seems you splendidly defeated the enemy who shot me, didn't you. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thank you, dawayo!
I feel so much better now, dawayo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now we can safely expose ourselves on top of the spaceship
or anywhere else without a care, jan.
It's completely safe now, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0005
rows.name:
We won't have to work while being terrified of the Growth anymore,
and our maintenance will proceed smoothly, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0006
rows.name: You're a lifesaver, jan! Thank you, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0007
rows.name:
Putting work aside,
I feel like I could become good friends with you, dawayo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0008
rows.name:
That's great, jan!
A relationship that has nothing to do with work, jan!
True friendship, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev027004_MSG0009
rows.name:
Now that that's decided,
let's put all that aside and get along, jan! [ST:wait ]
